/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/zepra_browser.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/zepra_browser.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/zepra_browser.dir/src/engine/dev_tools.cpp.o CMakeFiles/zepra_browser.dir/src/engine/webkit_engine_stub.cpp.o CMakeFiles/zepra_browser.dir/src/engine/audio_stub.cpp.o CMakeFiles/zepra_browser.dir/src/engine/avmedia_stub.cpp.o CMakeFiles/zepra_browser.dir/src/engine/html_parser_stub.cpp.o CMakeFiles/zepra_browser.dir/src/search/ketivee_search.cpp.o CMakeFiles/zepra_browser.dir/src/ui/window.cpp.o CMakeFiles/zepra_browser.dir/src/ui/tab_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/zepra_browser.dir/src/ui/dev_tools_ui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/zepra_browser.dir/src/auth/zepra_auth.cpp.o CMakeFiles/zepra_browser.dir/src/ui/auth_ui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/zepra_browser.dir/src/ui/settings_ui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/zepra_browser.dir/src/sandbox/sandbox_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/zepra_browser.dir/src/config/config_manager.cpp.o -o bin/zepra_browser  -lSDL2 -lSDL2_image -lSDL2 -lSDL2_ttf -lSDL2 -lcurl -lssl -lcrypto -ljson-c /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLU.so lib/libzepra-core.a lib/libwebcore.a lib/libzepra-integration.a lib/libwebcore.a -lSDL2_image -lSDL2 -lSDL2_ttf -lSDL2 -lSDL2_ttf lib/libzepra-core.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcurl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcurl.so -ldl /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so
